_comment: NPC: Punnan Zi (Lou Hou) (飘南子 / 楼侯). Canon ID: N88. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Punnan Zi (Lou Hou)
note: Ancient antagonist; also known as Lou Hou

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: You are bold to enter my domain. The Sea of Devils has consumed cultivators far stronger than you. I am Punnan Zi. Remember that name. It will be the last thing you learn.
Lou Hou. That is what the ancients called me. Punnan Zi is what I call myself now. The difference between those two names is the difference between who I was and what the Sea of Devils made me.
Wang Lin. Yes, I know him. He passed through these waters once. He left pieces of himself behind — not intentionally. The Sea of Devils takes tolls from everyone. Even him.

If you seek the Heart Devil Flower that grows in the deepest currents, you will need guidance. I have guided many cultivators to it. None have returned. Bring me soul fragments and I will consider adding you to that count.

daily_schedule.action: Ancient meditation on Sea of Devils currents
Collect Heart Devil Flowers from deep currents
Consume spiritual energy from sea currents

sect_tasks.name: Heart Devil Flower Retrieval
sect_tasks.description: Punnan Zi sends cultivators to retrieve Heart Devil Flowers from the chaotic currents of the Sea of Devils. Few return.

sect_tasks.name: Sea of Devils Navigation Lore
sect_tasks.description: Punnan Zi trades knowledge of safe paths through the Sea of Devils in exchange for jade slips documenting other regions.
